sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْكَاتِبُ أَنَّ الطَّبِيعَةَ مِثْلُ الْكِتَابِ الْمَفْتُوحِ.
sentences.translation: Pisac vidi da je priroda poput otvorene knjige.
sentences.translationEn: The writer sees that nature is like an open book.

sentences.arabic: الشَّمْسُ فِي الصَّبَاحِ تُشْبِهُ التَّاجَ الذَّهَبِيَّ فَوْقَ الْجِبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Sunce ujutro liči na zlatnu krunu iznad planina.
sentences.translationEn: The sun in the morning resembles a golden crown over the mountains.

sentences.arabic: وَالْأَزْهَارُ تَبْتَسِمُ لِلنَّاسِ عِنْدَمَا يَنْزِلُ الْمَطَرُ.
sentences.translation: Cvijeće se smiješi ljudima kada pada kiša.
sentences.translationEn: Flowers smile at people when the rain falls.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْأَدَبَاءُ هَذِهِ الصُّوَرَ لِيَكُونِ الْكَلَامُ أَجْمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Književnici koriste ove slike kako bi govor bio ljepši.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use these images to make the speech more beautiful.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى رُؤْيَةِ الْعَالَمِ بِشَكْلٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore nam pomažu da vidimo svijet na nov način.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors help us see the world in a new way.
